subcodes.first_line: In these days when all the pillars trembled and were shaken by the might of tyranny, this Wronged One arose in support of the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ایامیکه ارکان جمیع از سطوت ظلم مضطرب و متزلزل این مظلوم بر امر الله قیام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @consolation and comfort
